title: India Search Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating Google's core search for India's diverse linguistic and digital landscape.
problem_statement: Despite language options visible, Google's search experience in India lacks deep regional content integration and local context.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for localized search in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and deep cultural insights.

pillars.title: Language Barrier
pillars.insight: Users struggle finding relevant content in native languages.

pillars.title: Information Access
pillars.insight: Many lack easy access to specific local information.

pillars.title: Digital Literacy
pillars.insight: Varying tech comfort impacts search efficiency.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we deeply localize search results for India?
How might users discover hyper-local information easily?
How might we integrate vernacular content creation?

data.name: ShareChat
cons: Not a search engine, content quality varies

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, reliable local business information.
personas.bio: Runs an electronics shop. Uses Google for supplier info, market prices, and local news.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Finding study materials in Hindi is often hard.
personas.bio: Pursuing literature degree. Relies on Google for research, news, and entertainment.

insights: Where can I find a good Hindi tutor?
I wish I could search by voice in my dialect.
Types in English, then local language.

points.action: Replace text input with advanced voice/image search.
Integrate local community forums with search results.
Tailor search algorithms for regional festivals/events.
Enhance search results with local expert reviews/videos.

pivot.before: Generic global search results often miss India's local nuances.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from language translation to deep cultural and contextual localization of content.
pivot.after: Hyper-localized search results, relevant to specific Indian regions and dialects.

annotations.title: Dialect Voice Input
annotations.rationale: Allows search in specific regional Indian dialects.

annotations.title: Local News Feed
annotations.rationale: Personalized news and events based on user's location.

annotations.title: Vernacular Content Filter
annotations.rationale: Filter results by specific regional languages and content types.

data.finding: Language options present but not prominent for content.
